productDisplayName: Locomotive Men American Glory White Tshirts
description: Composition White round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 100% cotton and graphic print with lettering on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron This white t-shirt from locomotive is bubbling with energy and style, and yearning to belong to you! Saluting the Esat Coast Army Wing, this tee uses a great colour combination in its graphic print to give you clothing that will make you the centre of attraction of every gathering! Team it with jeans or shorts for a perfectly casual and cool look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6", Shoulders-19"
